description_long: This is a dark-colored, double-ended open wrench with a hexagonal ring on one end and a U-shaped open jaw on the other. The body is elongated and flat, featuring a textured grip area with a series of small, evenly spaced holes or indentations along the handle for improved handling. The open jaw is robust and slightly angled, designed to fit over nuts and bolts, while the ring end is hexagonal for a secure fit on fasteners. The surface appears metallic with a matte finish, suggesting it is made from steel or a similar alloy. There are no visible brand markings or decorative elements, and the overall design is utilitarian and functional. The wrench is of a size suitable for hand use in automotive, construction, or general urban maintenance tasks.
description: A dark, double-ended open wrench with a hexagonal ring on one end and a U-shaped open jaw on the other, featuring a textured handle for grip. The surface is matte and metallic, with a utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open U-shaped jaw and the textured handle with visible grip holes.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the flat, elongated body and the thickness of the wrench.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying both the hexagonal ring end and the open jaw, as well as the full grip pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, similar to view 1, showing the flatness and length of the wrench.
attribute_handle_grip_pattern: The handle features a series of small, evenly spaced holes or indentations for improved grip.
